decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 57/3181 lines reworked (1.8%, 29/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 2.9% (8/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 39. Session 8: 36 (process:20 efficiency:12 ttfw:4). Session 9: 41 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:6). Session 10: 49 (process:20 efficiency:21 ttfw:8). Session 11: 38 (process:20 efficiency:11 ttfw:7). Session 12: 31 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:2).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 263/263 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
